name: sentry
description: Investigate Sentry with the official CLI and expert SDK setup guidance from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Investigate issues, traces, logs, and SDK setup with Sentry CLI
interface.longDescription: Use Sentry skills to query issues, events, traces, spans, logs, dashboards, organizations, and projects through the official Sentry CLI, and fetch expert SDK setup workflows from skills.sentry.dev when the task is installation or configuration.
defaultPrompt: Inspect recent Sentry issues, traces, or logs and summarize likely root cause and next steps
Help install or configure the right Sentry SDK for this project
